junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 bytecode, which may fail to run on a Java 17 runtime if newer language features or APIs are used, or simply fails to meet the migration goal of producing Java 17 artifacts.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependency is removed.
org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach and AfterEach are required for the new lifecycle methods; compilation fails without them.
org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions is required for assertions in JUnit 5; compilation fails if used without import.
junit.framework.TestCase is part of JUnit 3/4 legacy API; removing it is required to decouple from JUnit 4 dependencies.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.before:
import junit.framework.TestCase;
public class Demo01Test extends TestCase {

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 setUp method with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize @Override protected void setUp(); it requires @BeforeEach public void method.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 tearDown method with JUnit 5 @AfterEach.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize @Override protected void tearDown(); it requires @AfterEach public void method.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 annotations are not recognized by the JUnit Platform engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 annotations are not recognized by the JUnit Platform engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 API classes instead of JUnit 4.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them with JUnit 5 annotations leads to compilation errors or runtime classpath issues in a pure JUnit 5 environment.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update static imports to use JUnit 5 Assertions instead of JUnit 4 Assert.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 Assert class is not available in JUnit 5; code will fail to compile if JUnit 4 dependency is removed.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotations to JUnit 5 Jupiter annotations.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Assert) are not present or compatible in a JUnit 5/Jupiter test context, causing compilation errors or test discovery failures.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 Mockito runner with JUnit 5 Mockito extension.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.runner.RunWith and org.mockito.junit.MockitoJUnitRunner are JUnit 4 specific; JUnit 5 requires @ExtendWith and MockitoExtension to initialize mocks.
